details.page_functional: partially - UI responsive but chat stuck in loading state

analysis.observation: Same as #262: APF hold works (request held, no Mistral response). Warning response still not sent back. Diagnostic build adds info-level logging on server side (DECODE_OK, DECODED_SAMPLE, KEYWORD_CHECK) but client behavior is identical. Dev should check Etap logs for these diagnostic messages to understand: (1) if request body was decoded correctly, (2) what the decoded content sample looks like, (3) if keyword check is being executed and what result it produces.
analysis.comparison_with_262: Identical behavior. Hold works, warning not sent. Diagnostic logging only visible in Etap server logs, not in browser.
analysis.next_step: Dev should SSH to Etap and check /var/log/etapd or syslog for DECODE_OK/DECODED_SAMPLE/KEYWORD_CHECK messages while this hold is active.
